steps.title: Find the area scale factor
steps.content:
Increasing both length and width by $30\%$ multiplies each dimension by $1.3$. Area is multiplied by the product of the two scale factors.
$$1.3\cdot1.3=1.69$$

steps.title: Scale the original area
steps.content:
Multiply the original area by $1.69$.
$$2{,}400(1.69)=4{,}056$$
The answer is D.
